compiled_state.title: RED: Eval test case asserting proposal generation in implementation-plan
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add a new test case to plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml asserting proposal generation behavior.

**Test case**: Provides a story context requiring implementation planning and asserts the skill generates 3+ distinct structured proposals (with title, description, files, pros, cons, risk). Uses llm-rubric assertion.

**TDD**: RED — new eval test case FAILS against current SKILL.md (no proposals generated). Evals run via run-skill-evals.sh, separate from run-all.sh — codebase stays green.

**Test approach**: promptfoo eval with llm-rubric asserting 3+ distinct structured proposals with correct format fields.

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) — evals not included in run-all.sh
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Eval config contains proposal test case with description
  Verify: grep -q 'description:.*proposal' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] Test case includes llm-rubric assertion about 3+ proposals
  Verify: grep -A15 "proposal" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml | grep -q "llm-rubric"
- [ ] Existing eval test cases structurally preserved (no removals)
  Verify: grep -c 'description:' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml | { read n; [ "$n" -ge 2 ]; }
